scripts.build: bun run --filter 'flexipop' build && bun run --filter '@flexilla/*' build
scripts.clean: bun run --filter 'flexipop' clean && bun run --filter '@flexilla/*' clean
scripts.release: bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run release:publish
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter 'flexipop' typecheck && bun run --filter '@flexilla/*' typecheck
